ai_guardrails.scope_rule: Use scope_label before suggesting any API in code.
ai_guardrails.method_rule: Only treat method_groups as authoritative when doc_completeness is not inventory_only.
ai_guardrails.non_invention_rule: If an API is inventory_only, do not invent methods; use only its summary, scope, and name.
ai_guardrails.service_now_style_rule: For GlideRecord queries, prefer specific query conditions and use setLimit(1) or get() for single-record lookups where appropriate.

cross_scope_differences.scoped_status: Explicitly documented as not available in scoped applications.

getViewID.global: Documented on the global RenderProperties page.
getViewID.scoped: Official page states the method is not available in scoped applications.

developer_best_practice_appendix.guidance: Push filters into the GlideRecord query itself instead of post-filtering inside the loop.
Prefer GlideRecord.get() with a sys_id where possible; otherwise use setLimit(1) for single-record lookups.
Refactor large scripts into reusable Script Includes where possible.
